metadata.title: Zarin Teb | Inspiring a healthy life
metadata.description: We import and trade high-quality medical equipment in Afghanistan, ensuring healthcare excellence.

Hero.title: Inspiring a Healthy Life
Hero.description: ZarinTeb import and trades high-quality medical equipment, delivering innovative solutions to inspire healthier lives.

medicalMachinery.title: Medical Machinery
medicalMachinery.description: Advanced machines for diagnosis and treatment.

orthopedicProducts.title: Orthopedic Products
orthopedicProducts.description: Supportive solutions for bones and joints.

statsSection.title: Committed to Excellence in Medical Innovation
statsSection.description: We strive to revolutionize healthcare by importing top-tier medical equipment, ensuring accessibility to advanced medical solutions, and empowering healthcare professionals with the tools they need to provide exceptional patient care.

logoSection.title: Over 100 organization use our products for a better life.

footer.title: Zarin Teb
footer.description: Innovating medical equipment for better healthcare worldwide.

servicesSection.heading: Services we offer to support your progress.

F1.name: Ambulance and Lab Outfitting
F1.description: From design to installation, we offer full-service outfitting for ambulances and laboratory rooms.

F2.name: Global Medical Imports
F2.description: Importing essential medical equipment and supplies from global sources to meet your needs in Afghanistan.

F3.name: Medical Equipment Repair
F3.description: We offer comprehensive repair and maintenance for medical equipment, including importing original parts as needed.

ContactCTA.heading: Enhancing lives with better care. Connect with us today.

Hero-AboutPage.heading: Your partner in lifelong health and wellness
Hero-AboutPage.description: At Zarin Teb, we provide exceptional medical care with skilled professionals and modern facilities. Our comprehensive services reach every province through agencies across Afghanistan, ensuring your health comes first.

ContentSection-AboutPage.title: Our mission
ContentSection-AboutPage.description1: At Zarin Teb, our mission is to enhance healthcare with high-quality medical furniture and imported machinery. We design innovative solutions and source advanced equipment globally to empower medical professionals with reliable tools for better care.
ContentSection-AboutPage.description2: We also decorate laboratories and ambulances, tailoring spaces to healthcare needs, and offer repair services to keep equipment running smoothly. Our goal is to support a future where quality healthcare is always accessible.

timeLine1.name: Global Foundations
timeLine1.description: Launched with investments in world-class imported medical equipment to set industry standards.

timeLine2.name: Local Innovation
timeLine2.description: Began domestic manufacturing of medical furniture, reducing reliance on international suppliers.

timeLine3.name: Orthopedic Excellence
timeLine3.description: Started in-house orthopedic production, prioritizing national self-sufficiency in critical healthcare tools

timeLine4.name: Expanding Horizons
timeLine4.description: Entered new frontiers with advanced medical projects, redefining Zarin Teb’s role in healthcare.

LogoSection-AboutPage.title: Leading Innovators We Work With
LogoSection-AboutPage.description: Partnering with world-renowned medical manufacturers to deliver cutting-edge technology and quality that redefine healthcare standards.

OurPeople-AboutPage.title: Our Team in Action
OurPeople-AboutPage.description: Witness the passion and precision of our team driving innovation in manufacturing and orthopedic solutions.

ContactPage.heading: Contact Us
ContactPage.title: Get in touch
ContactPage.description: Have a question or want to work with us? Fill out the form or reach out directly — we’d love to hear from you.
ContactPage.address: Eb-sina Market, Eid ghah road, Herat, Afghanistan

notifications.success: Your message has been sent successfully! We will get back to you soon.

ourOffices.title: Our Offices
ourOffices.description: We are proud to have a presence across Afghanistan, serving our clients through multiple locations. Here’s where you can find us.

herat.address: Eb-sina Market, Eid ghah road, Herat, Afghanistan

mazar.name: Mazar
mazar.address: Opposite Balkh University, Masoud Square, Mazar-e-Sharif

servicePage.serviceTitle: Everything you need to enhance your healthcare experience

serviceCTA.title: Your Health, Our Priority
serviceCTA.subTitle: Our Services
serviceCTA.description: We provide trusted medical equipment and support to keep you safe and cared for. Contact us anytime, and we’ll be ready to help you as quickly as possible.
serviceCTA.descriptionCall: Get in touch with use for services call.

service1.title: Medical Equipment Services
service1.description: Expert repair and maintenance for medical devices, ensuring reliability and longevity.

service2.title: Ambulance Enhancement
service2.description: Advanced upgrades for ambulances, enhancing performance and patient care.

service3.title: Laboratory Design Services
service3.description: Custom laboratory designs for optimal research and testing environments.

service4.title: Radiology Room Design
service4.description: Precision-designed imaging suites for safe and advanced diagnostics.

service5.title: Bulk Medical Procurement
service5.description: Efficient bulk procurement of medical equipment with flexible delivery.

service6.title: Urgent Equipment Delivery
service6.description: Fast delivery of premium medical equipment for urgent needs.
